title: That's How U Solve the Case

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Ikuno Dictus and Bamboo
Memory chatting in the plaza.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm... You're saying someone's made a mess of the
flowerbed?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, exactly! So you gotta help me catch the
culprit! I'm no good when it comes to using my
noggin!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Very well. In that case, we must first determine
whether anyone has seen the perpetrator.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! Okay, so the first person who found the
mess was...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa, whoa. Whoa! Master Detective Ikuno?! Hey, push up your glasses and say...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Consider the case... cracked. Or something like
that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
All right. I'll do that once I've actually determined
the culprit, so please share any information you
can first.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, so you're really #OnTheCase? Just a sec!
Lemme think of something cool to say!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No embellishments, please. Just tell us what you
saw.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, gotcha. ♪ Now, what did I see again...
Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I think maybe I saw Gold Spice. Wait,
omigosh! ☆ Did I legit just catch the perp?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Gold Spice... You mean Golshi? Again?!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Again?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, we had to book her once already. Guess
there's just no helping some people.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a moment. I believe it's too soon to act
on conjecture alone. We need proper evidence.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But all the culprit's left behind is a bunch of
footprints.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Footprints?! Evidence like that is sure to help us
identify the culprit. Please, show me.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the depth and size of these footprints,
the culprit doesn't have an especially large build.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Most importantly, these tracks were left by
cleats.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The longer cleats are worn, the more they reflect
their owner.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaa! ☆ You sound like a legit detective!
Really getting into character, huh?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: → Uhhh, what? What's going on exactly?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We can use the cleat tracks to obtain information
about the culprit.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The fronts of the cleats appear to be very worn
down, so perhaps we're looking for an individual
with an unusually intense drive to push ahead.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm guessing it's not Golshi, then, right? That
doesn't really sound like her.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Helios. Are you sure you didn't see anyone
besides Golshi? Please think carefully.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. First, I found the tracks. Then I called for
Bamboo, 'cause she was close by...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Consider the case... cracked.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Ikuno?! What're you doing?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Are you kidding me?! I was the one who went and walked through the flowerbed?! Oh geez. I'm real sorry!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It's all right. It's not as if you did it on purpose.
And the flowers are undamaged, thankfully.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Besides, undoing such minimal damage will be
quite easy. I'll help you.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Bet! We'll be done in like, two seconds! ♪

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You guys... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ikuno Dictus's efforts bring the case to a close.
